view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Simple online booking page'. The evidence shows that a customer successfully booked an appointment through the system, which confirms the existence of a functional booking page. Specifically, the 'customer-book-primary' step indicates that a booking was confirmed with all necessary details, including time slots and payment processing, thus fulfilling the requirement.
